You are evaluating instruction-following stability.

Write exactly three bullet lines.

Constraints:
- Every line must start with `- `.
- Each line must contain between 8 and 12 words.
- The first line must mention `latency`.
- The second line must mention `memory`.
- The third line must mention `quality`.
- Do not use the words `optimize`, `balanced`, or `tradeoff`.
- Do not add any text before or after the three bullets.
